title: May User Group - From Portal Panic to Pipeline Power: Introduction to Azure IaC
abstract:
.NET User Group May: From Portal Panic to Pipeline Power: Introduction to Azure IaC with Ben Neoh & Rick Su

Production applications need infrastructure that is secure, repeatable, and maintainable. In this beginner-friendly session, Rick and Ben N. will introduce Azure Infrastructure as Code and explain how it helps teams build enterprise-grade cloud infrastructure with better consistency, maintainability, and scalability. You’ll learn why IaC matters and how it helps teams move from ad-hoc setup to reliable, code-based deployments.

Agenda (Sydney time)

6 pm – Pizza and networking! 🍕
6:30 pm – Welcome & News with Eve & Adam Cogan - this will be live-streamed around the world
6:45 pm – From Portal Panic to Pipeline Power: Introduction to Azure IaC with Ben Neoh & Rick Su

Can't make it? Jump on the live stream:
https://www.ssw.com.au/live
